headline: CoStar (CSGP) Stock Looks Reasonable On Sales But Rich On Broader Checks
summary: CoStar Group’s share price has fallen sharply over the past few years, yet its market based valuation checks paint a mixed picture rather than a clear bargain or clear overvaluation at the current level. The stock has declined 65.4% over the last 3 years, so the key question is whether today’s price already reflects those setbacks or still embeds further downside expectations. Recent acquisitions in residential and European real estate data can support longer term growth expectations, but...
